content:
Korean Translation get worse after resources update. After the update, some text changed based on English. 

Like 覚醒 : 각성 (Direct Read) -> 웨이크업 바디 (Wake-up Body, EN Read.)

 I considered where should I leave this note. When the mistranslate patch have reflect? And I wonder that you have plan to recruit traslator or translate team.
thread_title: 💭「Processing」Korean Translation get worse after resources update.

content: I'm creating this post to find out why the game is no longer available in the French Apple Store
